attributes.action: Call an immediate General Election and seek a change in Government leadership
attributes.additional_details:
The primary duty of any government is the protection and security of its citizens We believe the current administration has failed to meet this important obligation We believe that the current PM Keir Starmer no longer holds the confidence of the public to lead the nation or ensure its safety
Confidence in the government's ability to manage national security social cohesion, and the economy has diminished Therefore we call for
An immediate General Election to provide a fresh mandate and a new PM
attributes.background: Call for an immediate General Election to allow the electorate to decide the future direction of the country.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
